sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_cum_sum (id UInt32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayCumSum(values) AS cumulative_sum FROM test_array_cum_sum;
UPDATE test_array_cum_sum SET values = arrayConcat(values, [7]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayCumSum(values) AS updated_cumulative_sum FROM test_array_cum_sum;
